schemas.name: Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm offering IBBI-compliant valuations (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments, AIF), FEMA compliance, GST and income tax appeals, forensic accounting, company registration, and secretarial services across India.

address.streetAddress: G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai
Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, off Veer Savarkar Flyover, Goregaon West

schemas.name: Startup Advisory — DPIIT & Fundraising
schemas.description: Startup advisory: DPIIT registration, fundraising readiness, investor due diligence preparation, financial modelling, ESOP structuring, post-funding compliance.

mainEntity.name: What is DPIIT Startup India recognition?

acceptedAnswer.text: DPIIT recognition provides: self-certification under 6 labour/environmental laws, fast-track patent examination, tax exemption under Section 80-IAC (3 out of 10 years), easier public procurement. We handle the complete registration process.

mainEntity.name: How do you help with fundraising?

acceptedAnswer.text: We prepare the financial foundation: audited financials, financial model with scenarios, cap table clean-up, ESOP valuation, regulatory compliance check, and due diligence data room preparation. We do not do investor introductions — we make you ready for the investors you find.

mainEntity.name: Do you help with shareholders' agreement review?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We review SHA/SSHA from a financial and regulatory perspective: anti-dilution mechanics, liquidation preference waterfalls, FEMA pricing implications, exit clause tax implications, and ESOP pool dilution analysis.

mainEntity.name: What startup advisory services do you provide?

acceptedAnswer.text: DPIIT registration, business plan review, financial model preparation, pitch deck advisory, fundraising readiness assessment, investor due diligence preparation, ESOP design, term sheet negotiation support, and post-funding compliance setup.

mainEntity.name: How do you help startups prepare for fundraising?

acceptedAnswer.text: Financial model with 5-year projections, unit economics dashboard (CAC, LTV, payback period), cap table modelling with dilution scenarios, data room preparation, valuation range recommendation, and investor connect facilitation.

mainEntity.name: What is the cost of startup advisory?

acceptedAnswer.text: DPIIT registration: ₹5,000. Business plan + financial model: ₹25,000-₹50,000. Fundraising readiness package: ₹75,000-₹1,50,000. Monthly retainer (advisory + compliance): ₹15,000-₹30,000.

mainEntity.name: Do you help with ESOP design?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. ESOP scheme design, board/shareholder resolutions, ESOP valuation (Ind AS 102), grant letters, vesting schedules, and exercise mechanism. Also handle SEBI SBEB compliance for listed companies.

mainEntity.name: Can you help with term sheet negotiation?

acceptedAnswer.text: We advise on financial terms: valuation, liquidation preference, anti-dilution, ESOP pool, board composition, and protective provisions. We dont replace lawyers but ensure founders understand financial implications of every clause.
